source: #### Implement Feature Flags
market_electricity_transactions_silver_flag = False
tlf_column_addition_24147 = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"
#### Import python libraries

# - json: for encoding (serializing) Python objects to JSON and decoding (deserializing) JSON strings
# - logging: for logging events or errors within the application
# - sys: for accessing system-specific parameters and functions
# - Window: perform window operations on DataFrames
# - hash: for computing a hash value for specified columns
# - functions: for column operations and transformations
# - col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format: for column reference, string concatenation, literal values, timestamp conversion, current timestamp, and date formatting
# - sha2, concat_ws: for SHA-2 hashing and concatenating strings with a separator
# - types: for defining DataFrame schemas with structured fields and specific column types
# - datetime: for handling date and time operations
import json
if market_electricity_transactions_silver_flag or tlf_column_addition_24147:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    import logging
    import sys
    from pyspark.sql import Window
    from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, current_timestamp, date_format, to_date
    from pyspark.sql.functions import hash, sha2, concat_ws, when, coalesce, regexp_extract, lower, row_number
    from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType
    from datetime import datetime
    spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
    from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
    from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
    from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, current_timestamp, date_format
    from pyspark.sql.functions import hash, sha2, concat_ws
    from datetime import datetime

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
lake_db_name = "silver"
db_notebookname= "market_electricity_transactions_silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"]

set_energy_transactions_cutover_date_string = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='set_energy_transactions_cutover_date').collect()[0]["Value"]
set_energy_transactions_cutover_date = spark.sql(f"SELECT to_timestamp('{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date_string}', 'yyyy-MM-dd') as date_timestamp").collect()[0]["date_timestamp"]


#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Silver_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Silver_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']
#### Configure logging

if market_electricity_transactions_silver_flag or tlf_column_addition_24147:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    # Configure logging
    def setup_logger(notebook_name):
        # Get or create logger
        logger = logging.getLogger(notebook_name)
        logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)  # Set to DEBUG for detailed logs

        # Remove any existing handlers to prevent duplicates
        logger.handlers.clear()

        # Prevent propagation to root logger (avoids default handlers)
        logger.propagate = False

        # Create console handler
        console_handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
        console_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)

        # Define log format (only the formatted line will appear)
        log_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
        console_handler.setFormatter(log_format)

        # Add handler to logger
        logger.addHandler(console_handler)
        
        return logger
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
# Table: market_electricity_transactions: START

#UTILS: Set table name

#tablename="market_electricity_transactions"

#UTILS: Drop table

#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{tablename}""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{tablename}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
#Set table name
db_tablename="market_electricity_transactions"

if market_electricity_transactions_silver_flag or tlf_column_addition_24147:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    #Create Silver Table
    try:
        spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
        spark.sql(f"""
        CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
        (
            SettlementDate TIMESTAMP,
            VersionNo DECIMAL(3,0),
            PeriodId DECIMAL(3,0),
            ParticipantId STRING,
            MeterType STRING,
            DUID STRING,
            MappedDUID STRING,
            DispatchableUnitName STRING,
            ConnectionPointId STRING,
            TCPID STRING,
            StationId STRING,
            StationName STRING,
            TLF DECIMAL(18,8),
            Energy_Sent_In_MWH DECIMAL(18,8),
            Energy_Sent_Out_MWH DECIMAL(18,8),
            Energy_As_Gen_MWH DECIMAL(18,8),
            RecordSourceTableName STRING,
            RecordSourceHashKey STRING,
            CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
            CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
            CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
            CDCOps INT,
            CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
            HashKey STRING,
            HashDiff STRING
        )
        USING delta
        LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
        """)
        
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Failed to create delta table:  {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}: {str(e)}")
        raise
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
    #Create Silver Table
    spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
    (
        SettlementDate TIMESTAMP,
        VersionNo DECIMAL(3,0),
        PeriodId DECIMAL(3,0),
        ParticipantId STRING,
        MeterType STRING,
        DUID STRING,
        DispatchableUnitName STRING,
        ConnectionPointId STRING,
        TCPID STRING,
        StationId STRING,
        StationName STRING,
        Energy_Sent_In_MWH DECIMAL(18,8),
        Energy_Sent_Out_MWH DECIMAL(18,8),
        RecordSourceTableName STRING,
        RecordSourceHashKey STRING,
        CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCOps INT,
        CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
        HashKey STRING,
        HashDiff STRING
    )
    USING delta
    LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

if market_electricity_transactions_silver_flag:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    logger.info(f"Started - Process to extract data from emms_longterm_bronze tables")
    try:
        source_sql_df = spark.sql(f"""
        WITH cte_duid_station AS
        (
            SELECT
            d.DUID
            ,du.DUName as DispatchableUnitName
            ,d.StationId
            ,s.StationName
            ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY d.DUID ORDER BY d.LastChanged DESC, d.StationId) as RowId
            FROM emms_longterm_bronze.dudetailsummary d
            LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.station s ON s.StationId = d.StationId and s.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
            LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.dispatchableunit du ON du.DUID = d.DUID and du.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
            where d.CDCCurrentFlag = 1    
        )
        ,cte_cp_station AS
        (
            SELECT
            d.ConnectionPointId
            ,d.StationId
            ,s.StationName
            ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY d.ConnectionPointId ORDER BY d.LastChanged DESC, d.StationId) as RowId
            FROM emms_longterm_bronze.dudetailsummary d
            LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.station s ON s.StationId = d.StationId and s.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
            where d.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        )
        --setgendata
            SELECT
            gen.SettlementDate
            ,gen.VersionNo
            ,gen.PeriodId
            ,gen.ParticipantId
            ,NULL as Meter_Type
            ,gen.DUID
            ,NULL as MappedDUID
            ,cd.DispatchableUnitName
            ,NULL as ConnectionPointId
            ,NULL as TCPID
            ,cd.StationId
            ,cd.StationName
            ,gen.TLF
            ,gen.ExpEnergy as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
            ,gen.GENERGY as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH
            ,NULL as Energy_As_Gen_MWH
            ,'setgendata' as RecordSourceTableName
            ,gen.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
            FROM emms_longterm_bronze.setgendata gen
            LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_duid_station cd ON gen.DUID = cd.DUID and cd.RowId = 1
            WHERE gen.SettlementDate < '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
            AND gen.CDCCurrentFlag = 1

        UNION ALL
        --setcpdata
            SELECT
            scp.SettlementDate
            ,scp.VersionNo
            ,scp.PeriodId
            ,scp.ParticipantId
            ,NULL as Meter_Type
            ,NULL as DUID
            ,NULL as MappedDUID
            ,NULL as DispatchableUnitName
            ,NULL as ConnectionPointId
            ,scp.TCPID as TCPID
            ,CASE WHEN scp.TCPID = 'QWIP' THEN 'WIVENHOE' ELSE NULL END as StationId
            ,CASE WHEN scp.TCPID = 'QWIP' THEN 'WIVENHOE POWER STATION' ELSE NULL END as StationName
            ,scp.TLF
            ,scp.XNENERGY as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
            ,NULL as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH        --This metric is not applicable to the source table
            ,NULL as Energy_As_Gen_MWH
            ,'setcpdata' as RecordSourceTableName
            ,scp.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
            FROM emms_longterm_bronze.setcpdata scp
            WHERE scp.SettlementDate < '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
            AND scp.CDCCurrentFlag = 1

        UNION ALL
        --set_energy_transactions
            SELECT
            et.SettlementDate
            ,et.VersionNo
            ,et.PeriodId
            ,et.ParticipantId
            ,et.Meter_Type
            ,NULL as DUID
            ,NULL as MappedDUID
            ,NULL as DispatchableUnitName
            ,et.ConnectionPointId
            ,NULL as TCPID
            ,cp.StationId
            ,cp.StationName
            ,et.TLF
            ,et.ACE_MWH as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
            ,et.ASOE_MWH as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH
            ,NULL as Energy_As_Gen_MWH
            ,'set_energy_transactions' as RecordSourceTableName
            ,et.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
            FROM emms_longterm_bronze.set_energy_transactions et
            LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_cp_station cp ON cp.ConnectionPointId = et.ConnectionPointId and cp.RowId = 1
            WHERE et.SettlementDate >= '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
            AND et.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        
        UNION ALL
        --dispatch_load
            SELECT distinct
            date_trunc("Day", dl.SettlementDate) as SettlementDate
            ,dl.RunNo as VersionNo
            ,right(dl.DispatchInterval,3) as PeriodId
            ,cd.ParticipantId
            ,'' as Meter_Type
            ,dl.DUID
            ,cd.Mapped_DUID as MappedDUID
            ,NULL as DispatchableUnitName
            ,cd.ConnectionPointId
            ,NULL as TCPID
            ,cd.StationId
            ,cd.StationId as StationName
            ,NULL as TLF
            ,NULL as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
            ,NULL as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH
            ,dl.InitialMW/12 as Energy_As_Gen_MWH
            ,'dispatchload' as RecordSourceTableName
            ,dl.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
            FROM emms_longterm_bronze.dispatchload dl
            LEFT OUTER JOIN esg_sharepoint_bronze.duid_connection_point_mapping cd ON cd.DUID = dl.DUID 
                            and (to_date(dl.SettlementDate,'dd/MM/yyyy') BETWEEN to_date(cd.ValidFromDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_date(cd.ValidToDate,'yyyy-MM-dd'))
            WHERE dl.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        """)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error - Process to extract data from emms_longterm_bronze tables: {str(e)}")
        raise
    finally:
        logger.info("Completed - Process to extract data from emms_longterm_bronze tables")

elif tlf_column_addition_24147:
    print("Feature Flag : tlf_column_addition_24147 turned on")
    source_sql_df = spark.sql(f"""
    WITH cte_duid_station AS
    (
        SELECT
        d.DUID
        ,du.DUName as DispatchableUnitName
        ,d.StationId
        ,s.StationName
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY d.DUID ORDER BY d.LastChanged DESC, d.StationId) as RowId
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.dudetailsummary d
        LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.station s ON s.StationId = d.StationId and s.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.dispatchableunit du ON du.DUID = d.DUID and du.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        where d.CDCCurrentFlag = 1    
    )
    ,cte_cp_station AS
    (
        SELECT
        d.ConnectionPointId
        ,d.StationId
        ,s.StationName
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY d.ConnectionPointId ORDER BY d.LastChanged DESC, d.StationId) as RowId
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.dudetailsummary d
        LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.station s ON s.StationId = d.StationId and s.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        where d.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
    )
    --setgendata
        SELECT
        gen.SettlementDate
        ,gen.VersionNo
        ,gen.PeriodId
        ,gen.ParticipantId
        ,NULL as Meter_Type
        ,gen.DUID
        ,NULL as MappedDUID
        ,cd.DispatchableUnitName
        ,NULL as ConnectionPointId
        ,NULL as TCPID
        ,cd.StationId
        ,cd.StationName
        ,gen.TLF
        ,gen.ExpEnergy as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
        ,gen.GENERGY as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH
        ,NULL as Energy_As_Gen_MWH
        ,'setgendata' as RecordSourceTableName
        ,gen.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.setgendata gen
        LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_duid_station cd ON gen.DUID = cd.DUID and cd.RowId = 1
        WHERE gen.SettlementDate < '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
        AND gen.CDCCurrentFlag = 1

    UNION ALL
    --setcpdata
        SELECT
        scp.SettlementDate
        ,scp.VersionNo
        ,scp.PeriodId
        ,scp.ParticipantId
        ,NULL as Meter_Type
        ,NULL as DUID
        ,NULL as MappedDUID
        ,NULL as DispatchableUnitName
        ,NULL as ConnectionPointId
        ,scp.TCPID as TCPID
        ,CASE WHEN scp.TCPID = 'QWIP' THEN 'WIVENHOE' ELSE NULL END as StationId
        ,CASE WHEN scp.TCPID = 'QWIP' THEN 'WIVENHOE POWER STATION' ELSE NULL END as StationName
        ,scp.TLF
        ,scp.XNENERGY as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
        ,NULL as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH        --This metric is not applicable to the source table
        ,NULL as Energy_As_Gen_MWH
        ,'setcpdata' as RecordSourceTableName
        ,scp.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.setcpdata scp
        WHERE scp.SettlementDate < '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
        AND scp.CDCCurrentFlag = 1

    UNION ALL
    --set_energy_transactions
        SELECT
        et.SettlementDate
        ,et.VersionNo
        ,et.PeriodId
        ,et.ParticipantId
        ,et.Meter_Type
        ,NULL as DUID
        ,NULL as MappedDUID
        ,NULL as DispatchableUnitName
        ,et.ConnectionPointId
        ,NULL as TCPID
        ,cp.StationId
        ,cp.StationName
        ,et.TLF
        ,et.ACE_MWH as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
        ,et.ASOE_MWH as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH
        ,NULL as Energy_As_Gen_MWH
        ,'set_energy_transactions' as RecordSourceTableName
        ,et.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.set_energy_transactions et
        LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_cp_station cp ON cp.ConnectionPointId = et.ConnectionPointId and cp.RowId = 1
        WHERE et.SettlementDate >= '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
        AND et.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
    """)
    
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
    source_sql_df = spark.sql(f"""
    WITH cte_duid_station AS
    (
        SELECT
        d.DUID
        ,du.DUName as DispatchableUnitName
        ,d.StationId
        ,s.StationName
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY d.DUID ORDER BY d.LastChanged DESC, d.StationId) as RowId
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.dudetailsummary d
        LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.station s ON s.StationId = d.StationId and s.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.dispatchableunit du ON du.DUID = d.DUID and du.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        where d.CDCCurrentFlag = 1    
    )
    ,cte_cp_station AS
    (
        SELECT
        d.ConnectionPointId
        ,d.StationId
        ,s.StationName
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY d.ConnectionPointId ORDER BY d.LastChanged DESC, d.StationId) as RowId
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.dudetailsummary d
        LEFT OUTER JOIN emms_longterm_bronze.station s ON s.StationId = d.StationId and s.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        where d.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
    )
    --setgendata
        SELECT
        gen.SettlementDate
        ,gen.VersionNo
        ,gen.PeriodId
        ,gen.ParticipantId
        ,NULL as Meter_Type
        ,gen.DUID
        ,cd.DispatchableUnitName
        ,NULL as ConnectionPointId
        ,NULL as TCPID
        ,cd.StationId
        ,cd.StationName
        ,gen.ExpEnergy as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
        ,gen.GENERGY as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH
        ,'setgendata' as RecordSourceTableName
        ,gen.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.setgendata gen
        LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_duid_station cd ON gen.DUID = cd.DUID and cd.RowId = 1
        WHERE gen.SettlementDate < '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
        AND gen.CDCCurrentFlag = 1

    UNION ALL
    --setcpdata
        SELECT
        scp.SettlementDate
        ,scp.VersionNo
        ,scp.PeriodId
        ,scp.ParticipantId
        ,NULL as Meter_Type
        ,NULL as DUID
        ,NULL as DispatchableUnitName
        ,NULL as ConnectionPointId
        ,scp.TCPID as TCPID
        ,CASE WHEN scp.TCPID = 'QWIP' THEN 'WIVENHOE' ELSE NULL END as StationId
        ,CASE WHEN scp.TCPID = 'QWIP' THEN 'WIVENHOE POWER STATION' ELSE NULL END as StationName
        ,scp.XNENERGY as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
        ,NULL as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH        --This metric is not applicable to the source table
        ,'setcpdata' as RecordSourceTableName
        ,scp.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.setcpdata scp
        WHERE scp.SettlementDate < '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
        AND scp.CDCCurrentFlag = 1

    UNION ALL
    --set_energy_transactions
        SELECT
        et.SettlementDate
        ,et.VersionNo
        ,et.PeriodId
        ,et.ParticipantId
        ,et.Meter_Type
        ,NULL as DUID
        ,NULL as DispatchableUnitName
        ,et.ConnectionPointId
        ,NULL as TCPID
        ,cp.StationId
        ,cp.StationName
        ,et.ACE_MWH as Energy_Sent_In_MWH
        ,et.ASOE_MWH as Energy_Sent_Out_MWH
        ,'set_energy_transactions' as RecordSourceTableName
        ,et.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey
        FROM emms_longterm_bronze.set_energy_transactions et
        LEFT OUTER JOIN cte_cp_station cp ON cp.ConnectionPointId = et.ConnectionPointId and cp.RowId = 1
        WHERE et.SettlementDate >= '{set_energy_transactions_cutover_date}'
        AND et.CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
if market_electricity_transactions_silver_flag or tlf_column_addition_24147:
    print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
    try:
        source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "SettlementDate", "VersionNo", "PeriodId", "ParticipantId", "ConnectionPointId", "Meter_Type", "DUID", "StationId", "TCPID", "RecordSourceTableName", "RecordSourceHashKey"), 256))
        source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "MappedDUID", "DispatchableUnitName", "StationName", "TLF", "Energy_Sent_In_MWH", "Energy_Sent_Out_MWH", "Energy_As_Gen_MWH"), 256))
        source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
        source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
        source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
        source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
        source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error - Error adding CDC columns to: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} : {str(e)}")
        raise
else:
    print("Feature Flag turned off, new code not allowed to run.")
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "SettlementDate", "VersionNo", "PeriodId", "ParticipantId", "ConnectionPointId", "Meter_Type", "DUID", "StationId", "TCPID", "RecordSourceTableName", "RecordSourceHashKey"), 256))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "DispatchableUnitName", "StationName", "Energy_Sent_In_MWH", "Energy_Sent_Out_MWH"), 256))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

# Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
source_sql_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_view")

# SCD2 logic
if market_electricity_transactions_silver_flag or tlf_column_addition_24147:
  print("Feature Flag turned on, new code allowed to run.")
  logger.info(f"Started - Merge operation to update the target table: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}")
  try:
    # Use the merge operation to update the target table
    spark.sql(f"""
        MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
        USING temp_view s
        ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
        WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
          UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                    t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                    t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
          INSERT (SettlementDate, VersionNo, PeriodId, ParticipantId, MeterType, DUID, MappedDUID, DispatchableUnitName, ConnectionPointId, TCPID, StationId, StationName, TLF, Energy_Sent_In_MWH, Energy_Sent_Out_MWH, Energy_As_Gen_MWH, RecordSourceTableName, RecordSourceHashKey, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
          VALUES (s.SettlementDate, s.VersionNo, s.PeriodId, s.ParticipantId, s.Meter_Type, s.DUID, s.MappedDUID, s.DispatchableUnitName, s.ConnectionPointId, s.TCPID, s.StationId, s.StationName, s.TLF, s.Energy_Sent_In_MWH, s.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH, s.Energy_As_Gen_MWH, s.RecordSourceTableName, s.RecordSourceHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
    """)

    # Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
    spark.sql(f"""
        MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
        USING temp_view s
        ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
        WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
          UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                    t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                    t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
          INSERT (SettlementDate, VersionNo, PeriodId, ParticipantId, MeterType, DUID, MappedDUID, DispatchableUnitName, ConnectionPointId, TCPID, StationId, StationName, TLF, Energy_Sent_In_MWH, Energy_Sent_Out_MWH, Energy_As_Gen_MWH, RecordSourceTableName, RecordSourceHashKey, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
          VALUES (s.SettlementDate, s.VersionNo, s.PeriodId, s.ParticipantId, s.Meter_Type, s.DUID, s.MappedDUID, s.DispatchableUnitName, s.ConnectionPointId, s.TCPID, s.StationId, s.StationName, s.TLF, s.Energy_Sent_In_MWH, s.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH, s.Energy_As_Gen_MWH, s.RecordSourceTableName, s.RecordSourceHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
    """)  
  except Exception as e:
      logger.error(f"Error - Merge operation to update the target table: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} : {str(e)}")
      raise
  finally:
      logger.info(f"Completed - Merge operation to update the target table: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}")
else:

        VALUES (s.SettlementDate, s.VersionNo, s.PeriodId, s.ParticipantId, s.Meter_Type, s.DUID, s.DispatchableUnitName, s.ConnectionPointId, s.TCPID, s.StationId, s.StationName, s.Energy_Sent_In_MWH, s.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH, s.RecordSourceTableName, s.RecordSourceHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
  """)

        VALUES (s.SettlementDate, s.VersionNo, s.PeriodId, s.ParticipantId, s.Meter_Type, s.DUID, s.DispatchableUnitName, s.ConnectionPointId, s.TCPID, s.StationId, s.StationName, s.Energy_Sent_In_MWH, s.Energy_Sent_Out_MWH, s.RecordSourceTableName, s.RecordSourceHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
  """)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
